title: carex subcaespitosa
intro: Carex subcaespitosa, also known as the tufted sedge, is a type of perennial plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex subcaespitosa include its potential to help with digestive issues and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine for its wound-healing properties.
